items.title: Daily Morning Routine
items.prompt: Describe your morning routine using simple sentences in English.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'I get up at...', 'I have breakfast', and 'I brush my teeth'.
items.sample: I get up at 7. I have breakfast. I brush my teeth.

ja.prompt: 英語で簡単な文を使って朝のルーティンを説明してください。
ja.hint: 'I get up at...', 'I have breakfast', 'I brush my teeth' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: I get up at 7. I have breakfast. I brush my teeth.

zh.prompt: 用簡單的英文句子描述你的早晨例行公事。
zh.hint: 使用像 'I get up at...', 'I have breakfast', 'I brush my teeth' 這樣的片語。
zh.sample: I get up at 7. I have breakfast. I brush my teeth.

items.title: School Day Activities
items.prompt: Write about what you do at school using English sentences.
items.hint: Include activities like 'I go to school', 'I take classes', and 'I have lunch at the cafeteria'.
items.sample: I go to school. I take classes. I have lunch at the cafeteria.

ja.prompt: 学校での活動について英語の文で書いてください。
ja.hint: 'I go to school', 'I take classes', 'I have lunch at the cafeteria' のような活動を含めましょう。
ja.sample: I go to school. I take classes. I have lunch at the cafeteria.

zh.prompt: 用英文句子寫出你在學校做的事情。
zh.hint: 包含像 'I go to school', 'I take classes', 'I have lunch at the cafeteria' 這些活動。
zh.sample: I go to school. I take classes. I have lunch at the cafeteria.

items.title: After School Routine
items.prompt: Describe your after school activities in English.
items.hint: Use sentences like 'I play with my friends', 'I do my homework', and 'I have dinner'.
items.sample: I come home. I do my homework. I have dinner.

ja.prompt: 放課後の活動を英語で説明してください。
ja.hint: 'I play with my friends', 'I do my homework', 'I have dinner' のような文を使いましょう。
ja.sample: I come home. I do my homework. I have dinner.

zh.prompt: 用英文描述你放學後的活動。
zh.hint: 使用像 'I play with my friends', 'I do my homework', 'I have dinner' 這樣的句子。
zh.sample: I come home. I do my homework. I have dinner.

items.title: Evening and Bedtime Routine
items.prompt: Explain your evening and bedtime routine in English.
items.hint: Include actions like 'I take a shower' and 'I go to bed'.
items.sample: I take a shower. I go to bed. Goodnight.

ja.prompt: 夜のルーティンと就寝前の習慣を英語で説明してください。
ja.hint: 'I take a shower' や 'I go to bed' のような行動を含めましょう。
ja.sample: I take a shower. I go to bed. Goodnight.

zh.prompt: 用英文說明你的晚上和睡前例行公事。
zh.hint: 包含像 'I take a shower' 和 'I go to bed' 這些動作。
zh.sample: I take a shower. I go to bed. Goodnight.
